Dialog.name: MSG_719_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 1 211}What a hapless night, is it not...? Well then, shall we begin?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_719_3_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 1 211}I'm impressed... It's tougher than it looks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_719_4_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 1 211}As a reward for your efforts, let me show you my power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_719_5_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 1 211}The finale was surprisingly unsatisfying, wasn't it...?[n]{f 1 1}
